title: Universal Tool Chasing and Goldsmith Hammer 1 and 5/8 inch Diameter DIY Crafting
description:
The 8331JH chasing and goldsmith hammer has two flat faces on each end with one end at 1” diameter and the other at 5/8” diameter. The flat faces are ideal for any crafts including forging or flattening of precious metals, including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. You can also use these flat faces on a round precious metal surface to even it out. This hammer is great for jewelers, machinists, artisans, metalsmiths, and more. It features a wooden handle for a comfortable grip.

Universal Tool Chasing and Goldsmith Hammer 1 and 5/8 inch Diameter DIY Crafting

The 8331JH chasing and goldsmith hammer has two flat faces on each end with one end at 1” diameter and the other at 5/8” diameter. The flat faces are ideal for any crafts including forging or flattening of precious metals, including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. You can also use these flat faces on a round precious metal surface to even it out. This hammer is great for jewelers, machinists, artisans, metalsmiths, and more. It features a wooden handle for a comfortable grip.

Key Features

  • HEIGHT: 8.5"
  • HARDNESS: 30-40HRC
  • MATERIAL: Stainless Steel
  • USES: Great for jewelers, machinists, artisans, metalsmiths, tinkers, and DIY enthusiasts
  • Ages 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CAGH
  • UPC: 060886172659
  • Color: brown
  • Size: 8.5 in
